content:
Just now

--

The article (available for free) is an abridged version of my book (free as an eBook) presenting a philosophical framework which equates Reality to God and God to Fate. It elevates the Biblical doctrine of God’s providence to a Fated state that still allows man to choose through divine conditional operations while giving reformed answers to why evil exists in life and how the universe began. It is meant to be expanded on as to become a complete system of thought/theory of everything. The full article (41 pages) is linked below.
https://davidpaskell.github.io/articles/
